other_observers: My husband Bob De Boer; I am the original finder
duration: 30 minutes on Aug 6, 1 hour on Aug 7
specific_location: Mile Marker 3 on Highway 34 going toward Grand Lake.
description: Light gray with long tail. Observed the divided tail when he flew. Tail was grayish with black tips, reddish to salmon colored axillaries, and salmon wing linings. Bill and legs appeared black to dark gray. Wings were dark gray to black.Behaviors: Sat on barbed wire fence. Flew to both sides of road. Flew down into pasture and back to wire.Call: none heardPlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Oveta De Boer, Oveta De Boer, Oveta De Boer
